name: Watermelon Fire and Ice Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Use up to 2 tablespoons chopped jalapenos, depending on taste.
2. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
3. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
Serving Suggestions:
- Serve over sliced oranges or cheese-filled manicotti.
- Top 1 cup sour cream with 1 cup salsa and serve with chips.
